final_prompt.prompt:
Create a luxury beauty product ad for a premium serum bottle, suitable for social media marketing.

Style/medium: high-end beauty product photography, editorial luxury aesthetic, photorealistic
Composition: product-centered hero shot, slightly above eye level, soft focus on background, shallow depth of field
Subject: glass serum bottle with pale golden liquid visible through clear glass, elegant minimalist bottle design
Scene/backdrop: soft pink gradient background, scattered rose petals around the base, water droplets splashing mid-air
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light from the side, gentle highlights on glass surface, warm and luxurious atmosphere
Color palette: soft blush pink as dominant base, pale gold liquid as focal accent, subtle rose petal pinks, clean white highlights
Materials/textures: transparent glass with refractive quality, liquid viscosity visible, delicate rose petal velvet texture, crisp water droplets
Avoid: harsh shadows, plastic-looking bottle, oversaturated colors, watermark, generic stock photo aesthetic, 8K stuffer words
